doc: CLI live model enumeration: parse the stdout of a backend's manifest `modelsCmd` (e.g. `mimo models`, `opencode models`). One model id per line; keep `provider/name` ids; drop blank lines, spaced lines, and chrome (any line without a slash, e.g. banners/headers/usage). ANSI escape codes are stripped first. Deduped, original order preserved. This is what lets CLI backends (mimo/opencode) show live models in Settings instead of a static catalog; macOS previously had no CLI enumeration path at all (refreshModels was gated on isHttp), so this pins the shared parser cross-platform.

cases.name: mimo models: provider/name lines kept in order
drop chrome (no slash), blanks, and spaced lines

in.stdout:
Available models:

deepseek/deepseek-chat
  using provider deepseek
opencode/big-pickle

cases.name: ANSI escape codes stripped before matching
